id.description: The feature flag's numeric ID (e.g. 1234), as returned by feature-flag-get-all. A flag key string (e.g. "new-checkout") is also accepted here and resolved automatically. Provide either `id` or `key`.

key.description: The feature flag key: the string identifier used in code (e.g. "new-checkout"). Use this when you have the key but not the numeric ID. Provide either `id` or `key`.
